mapper.sql: li.id, li.name, lic.category_id, COALESCE(c.name, li.category) AS category, li.location, li.found_time, li.finder_contact, li.description, li.image_path, li.status, li.claimer, li.claim_time, li.created_at, li.updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE lost_item SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, location = #{location}, found_time = #{foundTime}, finder_contact = #{finderContact}, description = #{description}, image_path = #{imagePath}, status = #{status}, claimer = #{claimer}, claim_time = #{claimTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM lost_item li LEFT JOIN lost_item_category lic ON lic.item_id = li.id LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = lic.category_id WHERE li.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM lost_item li LEFT JOIN lost_item_category lic ON lic.item_id = li.id LEFT JOIN category c ON c.id = lic.category_id
AND ( li.id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR COALESCE(c.name, li.category) LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.location LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.found_time LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.finder_contact LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.description LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.image_path LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.status LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR CASE li.status WHEN 'PENDING' THEN '待认领' WHEN 'CLAIMED' THEN '已认领' WHEN 'TRANSFERRED' THEN '已移交' ELSE li.status END LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.claimer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR li.claim_time LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM claim_record cr WHERE cr.item_id = li.id AND ( cr.id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cr.claimer LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cr.contact LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cr.claim_time LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR cr.operator LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ) ) )
AND (c.name LIKE '%' || #{category} || '%' OR li.category LIKE '%' || #{category} || '%')
AND li.location LIKE '%' || #{location} || '%'
AND li.status = #{status}
ORDER BY li.created_at DESC, li.updated_at DESC
